note: V11 Phase 2 design update — recent-winner exclusion window provisional default revised from 30 to 5 blocks. Banner reflects the new wording ('5-block cooldown', 'last 5 blocks'). Change driven by preliminary Monte Carlo (tools/lottery_montecarlo.py): cap=30 had ~12% rollover and largest sybil incentive; cap=5 zeros out dominant no-sybil lottery share with ~0% rollover and smaller sybil delta. Final value pending C9 confirmation. NO consensus behaviour change for any current chain height — Phase 2 stays gated by V11_PHASE2_HEIGHT = INT64_MAX. Phase 1 (block 7000) is unaffected. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
